verses.text: Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kum za li leh kum sawmgiatna, Israel-te tungah Solomon' uk a kum lina, a kha nihna ahi Ziv kha-in amah in Topa' biakinn lam ding kipan hi
Kumpi Solomon in Topa-a' dingin a lam biakinn, a sung pi sawmkua sau-in, pi sawmthum zai a, pi sawmlenga sang hi
Biakinn mai-ah a innlim pen biakinn zaina zahin pi sawmthum sau a, inn mailamah pi sawmlenga sang hi
Tua ciangin amah in biakinn-a' dingin a pualam a kihui tawlette a bawl hi
Amah in biakinn pang tuak leh a nunglam biakinn kawm kimkotin a kawm tungah zong inn lam a, a kimkot a pangah inndei bawl hi

A dawl nuainung pen pi sagih leh alang zai-in, a laita pi kua zai a, a thumna pi sawm leh alang zai hi. Kawm sungah innkam a lutlohna dingin amah in inn pualam pang kimkota dingin a nan'na singbekte a bawl hi

Biakinn a kilam ciangin a kitawhna mun panin a kibawlsa suangte tawh kilam hi. Tua ahih manin a kilam laitakin hei ahi a, sek ahi a, sik nazat khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a gingte biakinn huang sungah kizalo hi
A dawl nuainung lutna ding pen biakinn leitaw lampangah om hi. A dawl laita-ah kahlei zui-in kipai-in a dawl laita panin a thumna-ah kipai hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in biakinn lamin a zo hi. Amah in innkamte khungin taamtak peekte tawh inndap a bawl hi
Amah in a inn buppi tungah a lambehte zomin, dawl khat ciangin pi sagih leh alang sang ciat a, taamtak singte-in a biakinn tawh kizom hi
Tu-in Topa' thu Solomon' tungah hong tung a

“Nangmah in na lam hih biakinn tawh kisai-in, ka thukhamte zui-in ka ngeina kipte mang a, ka thupiaknate khempeuh kemin tuate na zuih leh, na pa David tungah ka gen thu nang' tungah kong kipsak ding hi
Tua ciangin na lam biakinn sung Israel mite lakah ka teng ding a, keima mi Israel-te ka nusia kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in biakinn lamin a zo hi
Amah in taamtak peekte tawh biakinn sung kawm dap hi. Sual panin inndap innsunte dongin amah in sing tawh a sunglam tuam hi. Tua ciangin amah in taaksan peekte tawh a sual tuam hi
Amah in sual panin innsun dong inn nunglam pi sawmthum taamtak peekte tawh lam a, amah in siangtho pen mun, biakinn sungnung dingin a inn sungah a bawl hi
Biakinn sungnung mai-a innsung, pi sawmguk sau hi
Innsunga om taamtak singte tungah umgah leh pakpalh lim kigelh hi. A vekpi-in taamtak a kidap hi a, suang kimulo hi
Amah in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang koihna dingin a sungtawng penah biakinn sungnung a bawl hi
Biakinn sungnung, pi sawmthum sau-in, pi sawmthum mah zai a, pi sawmthum mah sang a, amah in kham citak tawh a zut hi. Amah in taamtak sing biakna tau khat zong a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Solomon in kham citak tawh innsung zut a, biakinn sungnung mai kantanin kham khainiang khung a, kham tawh a zut hi
Amah in a inn buppi a zawh dongin kham tawh a zut hi. Biakinn sungnunga biakna tau buppi zong amah in kham tawh a zut hi
Amah in biakinn sungnungah oliv sing tawh kherub nih bawl a, pi sawmlenga tuak a sang hi
Kherub kha langkhat, pi sagih leh alang sau-in, kherub kha langdang khat, pi sagih leh alang mah sau a, a kha langkhat mong panin a mong langkhat dong pi sawmlenga ahi hi
Kherub adang khat zong pi sawmlenga mah sau a, kherub-te gel a sauna leh a pian'lim kibang hi
Kherub khat a sauna pi sawmlenga hi a, a kherub dang khat zong tua zah mah ahi hi

Amah in biakinn sung tawngnung penah kherub-te a koih hi. Kherub-te' khate kizal a, khat' kha in kawm banin, adang kherub' kha in a kawm langkhat ban hi. Amau' kha langkhatte gel inn laizangah kituah hi
Amah in kham tawh tua kherub-te a zut hi
Amah in a sungnung leh a puanung inndeite, a kimkotin inn kawm khempeuh tungah kherub-te leh nisuh kungte leh pakpalhte a bawl hi
A sungnung leh a puanung inndei sung innsualte amah in kham tawh a zut hi
Biakinn sungnung lutna dingin amah in oliv sing kongkhak peekte a bawl hi; a bangtung zawl leh kongkhak khuamte in kiu nga piangsak hi
Amah in kherub-te, nisuh kungte, leh pakpalh lim kibawlte tawh oliv sing kongkhak peek nihte a tuam hi; amah in tuate kham tawh zut a, kherub-te leh nisuh kungte tungah kham a theh hi
Tua bangmahin amah in kiu li nei-in biakinn sung lutna oliv sing kongkhak khuamte
leh taaksan sing kongkhak peek nihte a bawl hi. Kongkhak a peek nihte kikhepin, adang kongkhak a peek nihte zong kikhep hi
Tuate tungah amah in kherub-te leh nisuh kungte leh pakpalhte bawl a, tua a bawlte tungah a tukimin kham tawh a zut hi
Amah in a kiseek suang gual thum leh taamtak sing gual khat tawh a tual sungnung a bawl hi
A kum lina, Ziv kha-in Topa' biakinn a bulpi kipan hi
A kum sawmlekhatna, a kha giatna ahi Bul kha-in a na khempeuh leh a kigen khempeuh bangin a kizo hi. Amah in tua a lamna-in kum sagih sung hun a bei hi.
